title: rubus benguetensis
intro: Rubus benguetensis, also known as the Benguet raspberry or wild raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Philippines, specifically in the Cordillera region. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective against various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus benguetensis include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusions by steeping its leaves and fruits in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing its extracts with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
